class.help: Registra la rapidez de incorporación de cada Postulante
class.label: Rapidez Incorporación
class.name: RAP_INCORPORA

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_rap_incorpora as oi_rap_incorpora, t0.c_rap_incorpora as c_rap_incorpora, t0.d_rap_incorpora as d_rap_incorpora, SEC.policy, t0.c_rap_incorpora as CODE, t0.d_rap_incorpora as TEXT FROM SEL22_RAP_INCORPORA as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Rapidez_Incorporacion.RAP_INCORPORA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_rap_incorpora LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_rap_incorpora asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_rap_incorpora as oi_rap_incorpora, SEC.policy FROM SEL22_RAP_INCORPORA as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Rapidez_Incorporacion.RAP_INCORPORA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_rap_incorpora LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_rap_incorpora asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Rapidez_Incorporacion.RAP_INCORPORA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Rapidez_Incorporacion.RAP_INCORPORA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL22_RAP_INCORPORA.oi_rap_incorpora) as CNT from SEL22_RAP_INCORPORA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL22_RAP_INCORPORA.oi_rap_incorpora={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL22_RAP_INCORPORA.d_rap_incorpora,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL22_RAP_INCORPORA.c_rap_incorpora,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
